headline: SERV's DoorDash Momentum Builds: Can It Lift Robot Productivity?
summary: Serve Robotics sees DoorDash demand surge, with merchant count up roughly 6x in 2026, as it pauses new robots to lift utilization and per-bot productivity.

headline: Dollar Tree Stock Surges After Earnings. The Retailer Has a Big New Delivery Partner.
summary: The company posted adjusted earnings of $1.74 a share for its fiscal first quarter, up from $1.26 last year and above analysts’ consensus estimate of $1.53, according to FactSet.  Earlier Thursday, delivery platform  DoorDash  announced a partnership with  Dollar Tree  to offer on-demand delivery from the retailer’s U.S. stores.

raw.headline: Dollar Tree Stock Surges After Earnings. The Retailer Has a Big New Delivery Partner.
raw.summary: The company posted adjusted earnings of $1.74 a share for its fiscal first quarter, up from $1.26 last year and above analysts’ consensus estimate of $1.53, according to FactSet.  Earlier Thursday, delivery platform  DoorDash  announced a partnership with  Dollar Tree  to offer on-demand delivery from the retailer’s U.S. stores.

headline: Swift Ride Eliminates Fleet Theft and Saves Over $400k Annually with Geotab
summary: Geotab, today announced that Swift Ride, a subscription-based vehicle rental company serving gig economy workers, has achieved remarkable results using Geotab's connected vehicle technology, including eliminating vehicle theft entirely and saving over $400,000 annually.

headline: Summer of DashPass is Back to Help Fans Make the Most of FIFA World Cup 2026™
summary: TORONTO, May 28, 2026--Summer of DashPass is back on DoorDash just in time for the world’s biggest soccer tournament. As an Official Tournament Supporter of the FIFA World Cup 2026™ in Canada, DoorDash is helping DashPass members get closer to the action with unbeatable deals, chances to win match tickets, and exclusive fan experiences all summer long.

headline: DoorDash and Dollar Tree Partner to Bring Greater Value and Thrill of the Hunt Discovery On-Demand
summary: SAN FRANCISCO, May 28, 2026--DoorDash (NASDAQ: DASH), the local commerce platform, and Dollar Tree, Inc. (NASDAQ: DLTR), one of North America’s largest value retailers, today announced a new partnership to offer on-demand delivery from Dollar Tree’s full U.S. store footprint on DoorDash. With more than 9,000 stores available across 48 states, consumers can now shop more than 10,000 products from Dollar Tree on DoorDash, making it easier than ever to find everything from affordable essentials to
